addon_version.description: The version of the EKS addon.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EKS addon.

configuration_values.description: The configuration values for the EKS addon.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the EKS addon was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the EKS addon.

modified_at.description: The timestamp when the EKS addon was last modified.

pod_identity_association.description: Associations between pod identities and IAM roles for the EKS addon.

service_account_role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role associated with the service account for the EKS addon.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the EKS addon.
